Class LabelJumpStatement

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.statement.JavaStatement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.statement.JumpStatement
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.statement.LabelJumpStatement
All Implemented Interfaces:
ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, Reference, NameReference, SourceElement, Statement, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, SyntaxElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
Break, Continue
public abstract class LabelJumpStatement extends JumpStatement implements NameReference
Label jump statement.
